TÜBİTAK 3005 Project Support for Assoc. Prof. Dr. Petek Tosun

It is our distinct pleasure to announce that the project coordinated by

Assoc. Prof. Dr. Petek Tosun

from the Business Administration Department and entitled “Well-being of Elderly Consumers and Co-creation Behaviors: Social Policy Recommendations for Local Governments” has been funded by

TUBİTAK 3005 – Social Sciences and Humanities Program.

Prof. Dr. Nimet Uray

takes part in the project as an

Advisor

.

We congratulate our faculty member for her achievement and wish her continued success.

We also would like to thank Prof. Dr. Metin Kozak, Assoc. Prof. Dr. Dr. Meltem Kıygı Çallı and Prof. Dr. Nimet Uray for their valuable contributions during the panels.
